title: Pleiarina dictyoneura
taxonomy: Pleiarina dictyoneura is a species within the genus Pleiarina. The genus Pleiarina is a group of fungi, specifically belonging to the family Hericiaceae. Pleiarina dictyoneura's classification is further supported by its phylogenetic relationships within the broader fungal kingdom.
